args.Description: "Update routes in app.js to replace vs-sim/news-feed with topics and world-map"
args.Instruction: "Modify the routes mapping object in app.js."
args.ReplacementContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {
  home: renderHome,
  dictionary: renderDictionary,
  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'topics': renderTopics,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection,
  'world-map': renderWorldMap
};"
args.TargetContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {
  home: renderHome,
  dictionary: renderDictionary,
  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'vs-sim': renderVsSim,
  'news-feed': renderNews,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection
};"
